props.name: customTooltips
props.description: Enables custom html based tooltips instead of standard tooltips.

props.name: data
props.description: The data object that is passed into the Chart.js chart (more info).

props.name: height
props.description: Height attribute applied to the rendered canvas.

props.name: id
props.description: ID attribute applied to the rendered canvas.

props.name: options
props.description:
The options object that is passed into the Chart.js chartRef.value.

{@link https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/general/options.html More Info}

props.name: plugins
props.description:
The plugins array that is passed into the Chart.js chart (more info)

{@link https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/developers/plugins.html More Info}

props.name: redraw
props.description: If true, will tear down and redraw chart on all updates.

props.name: width
props.description: Width attribute applied to the rendered canvas.

props.name: wrapper
props.description: Put the chart into the wrapper div element.

events.name: getDatasetAtEvent
events.description: Proxy for Chart.js getDatasetAtEvent. Calls with dataset and triggering event.

events.name: getElementAtEvent
events.description: Proxy for Chart.js getElementAtEvent. Calls with single element array and triggering event.

events.name: getElementsAtEvent
events.description: Proxy for Chart.js getElementsAtEvent. Calls with element array and triggering event.
